sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51244" key="i(stio/kwpos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱστιό-κωπος</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ναῦς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51244.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with oars and sails</tr_>, a type of boat, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.25.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
